meta.title: Kourion Ancient Amphitheater – Limassol, Cyprus
meta.description: Complete travel guide to Kourion Ancient Amphitheater in Limassol. Learn about this historic landmark, including location, views, access, and visitor information.

intro.title: Discover Kourion Ancient Amphitheater
intro.description: The Ancient Theater of Kourion is one of the most impressive archaeological sites in Cyprus. Built in the 2nd century BC and expanded during Roman times, it offers breathtaking views of the Mediterranean Sea. Today, it continues to host cultural performances and concerts.

visitGuide.title: Visit Tips
items: Best time to visit is early morning or late afternoon.
Wear comfortable shoes for walking on ancient stones.
Bring water and sun protection in summer.
Don't miss the panoramic view of the sea from the theater.

sections.title: History & Archaeology
sections.content: The Ancient Theater of Kourion was built in the 2nd century BC and significantly expanded during the Roman period (2nd-3rd century AD). It could seat up to 3,500 spectators. The theater was destroyed by earthquakes in the 4th century AD but was partially restored in the 20th century.

sections.title: Location & Views
sections.content: Located on a hill near Episkopi village in Limassol district, the theater offers panoramic views of the Mediterranean Sea and the surrounding countryside. Its elevated position (about 50m above sea level) provides natural acoustics and a stunning backdrop for performances.

sections.title: Architecture & Design
sections.content: The theater follows classical Hellenistic and Roman design principles with semicircular seating (cavea), a circular orchestra, and a scenic background (scaenae frons). The restoration work has preserved the original stone seating and architectural elements.

sections.title: Preservation & Management
sections.content: The site is managed by the Department of Antiquities of Cyprus and is protected under Cypriot heritage laws. Ongoing conservation efforts ensure the theater remains structurally sound while maintaining its authenticity.

items.question: What are the opening hours of Kourion Theater?
items.answer: The site is open daily from 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM (winter) or 8:30 AM to 7:30 PM (summer). Last admission is 30 minutes before closing.

items.question: Is there an entrance fee?
items.answer: Yes, there is an entrance fee of €4.50 for adults. Children under 12 enter free. EU seniors (65+) get reduced rates.

items.question: Are there guided tours available?
items.answer: Yes, guided tours are available through the Department of Antiquities or private tour operators. Audio guides may also be available at the entrance.

items.question: Is the site accessible for wheelchair users?
items.answer: The main path to the theater is partially accessible, but the ancient stone steps and uneven terrain may be challenging. Contact the site in advance for assistance.

basicInfo.title: Basic Information
basicInfo.addressValue: Kourion, 19 km west of Limassol, on the road to Paphos

hours.title: Visiting Hours
hours.bestTimeSummer: Summer: Early morning or late afternoon recommended
hours.bestTimeAutumn: Autumn: Mild temperatures, ideal for exploring
hours.tip: Allow 1-2 hours for a full visit. Bring water and sun protection.

tickets.title: Admission Information
tickets.parkPrice: €4.50 for adults, free for children under 12

transport.title: How to Get Here
transport.fromCenterDesc: Distance about 19km west of Limassol. Car or bus recommended.
transport.fromStationDesc: Take bus route 16 or 17 from Limassol to Episkopi.
transport.fromAirportDesc: Rent a car or take a taxi. About 40km from Larnaca, 50km from Paphos.
transport.publicTransportDesc: Bus routes 16/17 from Limassol to Episkopi village.
transport.drivingDesc: Follow the B6 coast road west from Limassol. Well signposted.

route.title: Recommended Route
route.overview: Explore the ancient theater and surrounding ruins.
steps: Explore the Roman baths and houses
Enjoy the view from the theater seats

reviews.title: Visitor Reviews
reviews.declaration: Reviews can be viewed via Google Maps.
reviews.moreReviews: View more reviews on Google Maps

items.name: James W.
items.text: Absolutely stunning! The view from the theater is breathtaking. A must-visit in Cyprus.

items.name: Sophia M.
items.text: Incredible ancient site with amazing acoustics. The Mediterranean backdrop is spectacular.

items.name: Andreas K.
items.text: Rich history and well-preserved. The theater still hosts performances - magical atmosphere!

items.name: Emma L.
items.text: Beautiful site with great views. Recommend visiting in the morning to avoid crowds.

items.name: Michael R.
items.text: Fascinating piece of history. The audio guide was very informative.

items.name: Linda T.
items.text: One of the best archaeological sites in Cyprus. The theater is remarkably preserved.

officialManagement.title: About Kourion Ancient Amphitheater
officialManagement.text: The Kourion Ancient Amphitheater is managed and protected by the Department of Antiquities of Cyprus. The site is protected under the Cultural Heritage Laws of Cyprus.
